TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalengatan_no_pisafaol, title = Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalengatan_no_pisafaol, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalengatan_no_pisafaol} }

S.FORM: == Lalengatan no Pisafaol == Papiladomen ni mama ko malakakaay a fa'inayan Itiya ho ira ko cecay a mararamoday ca Lona Awaw aci Topalocong hananay,misafaloco' to sakasalisin no niyaro' to sapisamihecaan a lisin, so'elinay saciwawa sato cangra a mararamod ira ci Mayaw Kakalawan ko kaka, sacisafa saan ci Onak Kakalawan tatosa a malikaka, mahatatosa o fa'inayan. Safaloco' sato ko mama nangra a malikaka, "mikilang ho kita a maramamama" han no mama somowal koya malikakaay. So'elinay lowad sato a misakilang cangra i lotok no Falaaway. Yo misakilang ci mama, papiladomen ni mama ca Mayaw aci Onak a malikaka,yaan sato malikakaay "mafokil kami mama to lalan a miladom" han nona wawa, o mama sato "ano matira aca, tolikawen ho ako ko lalan namo" han to no mama. Oya mifariwan no mama a lalan .sapikepiked sanay, tama han no mama ko mara'ayay a mipalalan,yo tangasa i piladoman a sa'owac, maherek sato itira a mifariw a mipalalan, sowal sato ci mama:"oriri to ladomen to" han to ni mama ko wawa nira a tatosa. "hayi" sato koya malikakaay. Tahirahira i piladoman i, 'araw han mangota koya nanom, oya sato a malikakaay, "imatini sato i,mangota aca kinian a namom, a maamaanen no mita ko nipiladom" sato. Mafiyor a mangota ko nanom O cofay(patiko) to nangra tayra ci mamaan, "icowa ko nanom" han to ni mama nangra, sowal sato koya malikakaay, "tahira han niyam itira i, mafinor koya piladoman, mangota ko nanom, orasaka caay kami pihacol mama" han to no wawa, ci mama sato nangra saowal saan: " ano matira aca katayra ho miliyaw a miladom, tingalaw to kiya" han to no mama. Miliyaw heca a patiko koya wawa a tatosa a miladom, tahira han nangra, matiya to a mangota kaiya nanom, micofay heca kiyan a malikakaay,tahira saan i pisakilangan " ira " han ni mama nagra a mitala, " nawi, matiya to mama a mafinor, o cayay kami kapiladom" han to no wawa ko sowal ci mamaan. Ya sato mama ci Topalocong itira to a mayoyang to," ano matira aca a mafinor,o iraay ko mikari'angay i fafa'ed kiya, o hada demaken aca namo a malikaka, kasihawan ato 'idoc a miladom, tahira han namo ano mafinor heca, kamo to i,dipdip han a pasifafaw ma'araw namo koya a mingotaay haw, ano o maan to kira a mari'angay, ano ira a ma'araw namo itira,aka pisamata ka o recafi' namo a mipatay, tangsol han a militangal haw" han to no mama."hayi" sato koya tatosaay a wawa. Patayen koya mingotaay tangsol litangalen han no mama Tatoy sato koya malikakaay to hawan ato 'idoc a lomowad a miladom. So'elinay tahira han to itira i sa'owac, sa matiya to a mangota, dipdip(hokhok) sato koya a malikakaay pasifafaw, so'elinay tangasa i safafaw koya a malikakaay mafinor to ko nanom. Iniaan aca koya mifinoray to nanom a tamdaw,"inian a tamdaw ko mingotaay" sato a mayoyang koya a malikakaay,tangsol han to nangra a micocok ato milofot, maherek sato a militangal koya a malikakaay tiri'en to nangra koya a tangal, " ci mama ita kini " macekok, ono mita a mama a tangal, nengneng han ko pising so'elinay ci mama ita kini sato cangra. Taraana to i pisakilangan sato koya malikakakaay i, so'elinay malaheci away itira ci mama nangra, o ci mama heca nangra kinian a malofotay o tangic to niya malikakaay," patay han nomita ci mama ita" ,sato cangra.hinam han i,ci mama taca nangra ko mingotaay tinian a nanom, sapisafa'naaw ni mama nangra to wawa, nona o mangalayay to aca to sakapatayaw kinian a mama. Tatoy han to noya malikakaay koya tangal a minokay. Tangasa sato i loma', " citafad kami ina" han to noya malikakaay ci ina nangra, " hamay pa'arawi kako" han to no ina, pa'araw sa o paci'eng, "caay, ka o pising ko pa'arawen" han to no ina.Pa'araaraw sa o kakotong no laway, "caay, ka o pising" han to no ina. Pa'araaraw sa o pilofotan, mayoyang to ko ina," ka o pising" ha kiya kiso, so'elinay pa'araw hanto to pising, iyaan sato o ina "ci mama namo kiraan" sato a mayoyang ato mangic a misaheto(tada o tangic to ni ina), " ano matira aca kamo, o pa'acaay ko nika saanan namo ci mamaan namo, ka o nikangayaw" (militnagl to sapatodong to mama) han to no ina a mayoyang, so'elinay o satokol (misaliway to sakakahemaw no tatirengan) to nangra a malikaka masaromi'ami'ad a mafakac(comikay) ato ma'efer. Papilitangalen no ina to sapatodong to mama Ma'edeng to kini sato cangra a malikaka, o lowad to nangra a mi'adop to ngafor, so'elinay midepdep to cangra kiaan ngafor, malepel to nangrankiyaan ngafor, alaen to nangra ko remes ato do'es a paini ci inaan nangra, sowal sato ci ina nangra, "caay hen kini ka o matatodongay kinian a ngafor, tiyola hen a mi'adop" han to ni ina. === Pacefaday tilid ===
S.PHON: == ÉūaÉūÉÅatan no~u pisafao~uÉū == papiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn ni mama ko~u maÉūakakaaj a faĘĄinajan itija Ä§o~u ira ko~u ĘĶÉĘĶaj a mararamo~uÉŽ~ÉŪaj ĘĶa Éūo~una awaw aĘĶi to~upaÉūo~uĘĶo~uÅ Ä§ananaj,misafaÉūo~uĘĶo~uĘĄ to~u sakasaÉūisin no~u nijaro~uĘĄ to~u sapisamiÄ§ÉĘĶaan a Éūisin, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj saĘĶiwawa sato~u ĘĶaÅra a mararamo~uÉŽ~ÉŪ ira ĘĶi majaw kakaÉūawan ko~u kaka, saĘĶisafa saan ĘĶi o~unak kakaÉūawan tato~usa a maÉūikaka, maÄ§atato~usa o~u faĘĄinajan. safaÉūo~uĘĶo~uĘĄ sato~u ko~u mama naÅra a maÉūikaka, "mikiÉūaÅ Ä§o~u kita a maramamama" Ä§an no~u mama so~umo~uwaÉū ko~uja maÉūikakaaj. so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj Éūo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ sato~u a misakiÉūaÅ ĘĶaÅra i Éūo~uto~uk no~u faÉūaawaj. jo~u misakiÉūaÅ ĘĶi mama, papiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn ni mama ĘĶa majaw aĘĶi o~unak a maÉūikaka,jaan sato~u maÉūikakaaj "mafo~ukiÉū kami mama to~u ÉūaÉūan a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" Ä§an no~una wawa, o~u mama sato~u "ano~u matira aĘĶa, to~uÉūikawÉn Ä§o~u ako~u ko~u ÉūaÉūan namo~u" Ä§an to~u no~u mama. o~uja mifariwan no~u mama a ÉūaÉūan .sapikÉpikÉÉŽ~ÉŪ sanaj, tama Ä§an no~u mama ko~u maraĘĄajaj a mipaÉūaÉūan,jo~u taÅasa i piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman a saĘĄo~uwaĘĶ, maÄ§ÉrÉk sato~u itira a mifariw a mipaÉūaÉūan, so~uwaÉū sato~u ĘĶi mama:"o~uriri to~u ÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn to~u" Ä§an to~u ni mama ko~u wawa nira a tato~usa. "Ä§aji" sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj. taÄ§iraÄ§ira i piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman i, ĘĄaraw Ä§an maÅo~uta ko~uja nano~um, o~uja sato~u a maÉūikakaaj, "imatini sato~u i,maÅo~uta aĘĶa kinian a namo~um, a maamaanÉn no~u mita ko~u nipiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" sato~u. mafijo~ur a maÅo~uta ko~u nano~um o~u ĘĶo~ufaj(patiko~u) to~u naÅra tajra ĘĶi mamaan, "iĘĶo~uwa ko~u nano~um" Ä§an to~u ni mama naÅra, so~uwaÉū sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj, "taÄ§ira Ä§an nijam itira i, mafino~ur ko~uja piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman, maÅo~uta ko~u nano~um, o~urasaka ĘĶaaj kami piÄ§aĘĶo~uÉū mama" Ä§an to~u no~u wawa, ĘĶi mama sato~u naÅra sao~uwaÉū saan: " ano~u matira aĘĶa katajra Ä§o~u miÉūijaw a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, tiÅaÉūaw to~u kija" Ä§an to~u no~u mama. miÉūijaw Ä§ÉĘĶa a patiko~u ko~uja wawa a tato~usa a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, taÄ§ira Ä§an naÅra, matija to~u a maÅo~uta kaija nano~um, miĘĶo~ufaj Ä§ÉĘĶa kijan a maÉūikakaaj,taÄ§ira saan i pisakiÉūaÅan " ira " Ä§an ni mama na*ra a mitaÉūa, " nawi, matija to~u mama a mafino~ur, o~u ĘĶajaj kami kapiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" Ä§an to~u no~u wawa ko~u so~uwaÉū ĘĶi mamaan. ja sato~u mama ĘĶi to~upaÉūo~uĘĶo~uÅ itira to~u a majo~ujaÅ to~u," ano~u matira aĘĶa a mafino~ur,o~u iraaj ko~u mikariĘĄaÅaj i fafaĘĄÉÉŽ~ÉŪ kija, o~u Ä§aÉŽ~ÉŪa ÉŽ~ÉŪÉmakÉn aĘĶa namo~u a maÉūikaka, kasiÄ§awan ato~u ĘĄiÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĶ a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, taÄ§ira Ä§an namo~u ano~u mafino~ur Ä§ÉĘĶa, kamo~u to~u i,ÉŽ~ÉŪipÉŽ~ÉŪip Ä§an a pasifafaw maĘĄaraw namo~u ko~uja a miÅo~utaaj Ä§aw, ano~u o~u maan to~u kira a mariĘĄaÅaj, ano~u ira a maĘĄaraw namo~u itira,aka pisamata ka o~u rÉĘĶafiĘĄ namo~u a mipataj, taÅso~uÉū Ä§an a miÉūitaÅaÉū Ä§aw" Ä§an to~u no~u mama."Ä§aji" sato~u ko~uja tato~usaaj a wawa. patajÉn ko~uja miÅo~utaaj taÅso~uÉū ÉūitaÅaÉūÉn Ä§an no~u mama tato~uj sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj to~u Ä§awan ato~u ĘĄiÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĶ a Éūo~umo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um. so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj taÄ§ira Ä§an to~u itira i saĘĄo~uwaĘĶ, sa matija to~u a maÅo~uta, ÉŽ~ÉŪipÉŽ~ÉŪip(Ä§o~ukÄ§o~uk) sato~u ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj pasifafaw, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj taÅasa i safafaw ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj mafino~ur to~u ko~u nano~um. iniaan aĘĶa ko~uja mifino~uraj to~u nano~um a tamÉŽ~ÉŪaw,"inian a tamÉŽ~ÉŪaw ko~u miÅo~utaaj" sato~u a majo~ujaÅ ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj,taÅso~uÉū Ä§an to~u naÅra a miĘĶo~uĘĶo~uk ato~u miÉūo~ufo~ut, maÄ§ÉrÉk sato~u a miÉūitaÅaÉū ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj tiriĘĄÉn to~u naÅra ko~uja a taÅaÉū, " so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj maÉūaÄ§ÉĘĶi awaj itira ĘĶi mama naÅra, o~u ĘĶi mama Ä§ÉĘĶa naÅra kinian a maÉūo~ufo~utaj o~u taÅiĘĶ to~u nija maÉūikakaaj," pataj Ä§an no~umita ĘĶi mama ita" ,sato~u ĘĶaÅra.Ä§inam Ä§an i,ĘĶi mama taĘĶa naÅra ko~u miÅo~utaaj tinian a nano~um, sapisafaĘĄnaaw ni mama naÅra to~u wawa, no~una o~u maÅaÉūajaj to~u aĘĶa to~u sakapatajaw kinian a mama. tato~uj Ä§an to~u no~uja maÉūikakaaj ko~uja taÅaÉū a mino~ukaj. taÅasa sato~u i Éūo~umaĘĄ, " ĘĶitafaÉŽ~ÉŪ kami ina" Ä§an to~u no~uja maÉūikakaaj ĘĶi ina naÅra, " Ä§amaj paĘĄarawi kako~u" Ä§an to~u no~u ina, paĘĄaraw sa o~u paĘĶiĘĄÉÅ, "ĘĶaaj, ka o~u pisiÅ ko~u paĘĄarawÉn" Ä§an to~u no~u ina.paĘĄaraaraw sa o~u kako~uto~uÅ no~u Éūawaj, "ĘĶaaj, ka o~u pisiÅ" Ä§an to~u no~u ina. paĘĄaraaraw sa o~u piÉūo~ufo~utan, majo~ujaÅ to~u ko~u ina," ka o~u pisiÅ" Ä§a kija kiso~u, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj paĘĄaraw Ä§anto~u to~u pisiÅ, ijaan sato~u o~u ina "ĘĶi mama namo~u kiraan" sato~u a majo~ujaÅ ato~u maÅiĘĶ a misaÄ§Éto~u(taÉŽ~ÉŪa o~u taÅiĘĶ to~u ni ina), " ano~u matira aĘĶa kamo~u, o~u paĘĄaĘĶaaj ko~u nika saanan namo~u ĘĶi mamaan namo~u, ka o~u nikaÅajaw" (miÉūitna*Éū to~u sapato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅ to~u mama) Ä§an to~u no~u ina a majo~ujaÅ, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj o~u sato~uko~uÉū (misaÉūiwaj to~u sakakaÄ§Émaw no~u tatirÉÅan) to~u naÅra a maÉūikaka masaro~umiĘĄamiĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪ a mafakaĘĶ(ĘĶo~umikaj) ato~u maĘĄÉfÉr. papiÉūitaÅaÉūÉn no~u ina to~u sapato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅ to~u mama maĘĄÉÉŽ~ÉŪÉÅ to~u kini sato~u ĘĶaÅra a maÉūikaka, o~u Éūo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ to~u naÅra a miĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪo~up to~u Åafo~ur, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj miÉŽ~ÉŪÉpÉŽ~ÉŪÉp to~u ĘĶaÅra kiaan Åafo~ur, maÉūÉpÉÉū to~u naÅrankijaan Åafo~ur, aÉūaÉn to~u naÅra ko~u rÉmÉs ato~u ÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĄÉs a paini ĘĶi inaan naÅra, so~uwaÉū sato~u ĘĶi ina naÅra, "ĘĶaaj Ä§Én kini ka o~u matato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅaj kinian a Åafo~ur, tijo~uÉūa Ä§Én a miĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪo~up" Ä§an to~u ni ina. === paĘĶÉfaÉŽ~ÉŪaj tiÉūiÉŽ~ÉŪ ===
S.FORM: == Lalengatan no Pisafaol == Papiladomen ni mama ko malakakaay a fa'inayan Itiya ho ira ko cecay a mararamoday ca Lona Awaw aci Topalocong hananay,misafaloco' to sakasalisin no niyaro' to sapisamihecaan a lisin, so'elinay saciwawa sato cangra a mararamod ira ci Mayaw Kakalawan ko kaka, sacisafa saan ci Onak Kakalawan tatosa a malikaka, mahatatosa o fa'inayan. Safaloco' sato ko mama nangra a malikaka, "mikilang ho kita a maramamama" han no mama somowal koya malikakaay. So'elinay lowad sato a misakilang cangra i lotok no Falaaway. Yo misakilang ci mama, papiladomen ni mama ca Mayaw aci Onak a malikaka,yaan sato malikakaay "mafokil kami mama to lalan a miladom" han nona wawa, o mama sato "ano matira aca, tolikawen ho ako ko lalan namo" han to no mama. Oya mifariwan no mama a lalan .sapikepiked sanay, tama han no mama ko mara'ayay a mipalalan,yo tangasa i piladoman a sa'owac, maherek sato itira a mifariw a mipalalan, sowal sato ci mama:"oriri to ladomen to" han to ni mama ko wawa nira a tatosa. "hayi" sato koya malikakaay. Tahirahira i piladoman i, 'araw han mangota koya nanom, oya sato a malikakaay, "imatini sato i,mangota aca kinian a namom, a maamaanen no mita ko nipiladom" sato. Mafiyor a mangota ko nanom O cofay(patiko) to nangra tayra ci mamaan, "icowa ko nanom" han to ni mama nangra, sowal sato koya malikakaay, "tahira han niyam itira i, mafinor koya piladoman, mangota ko nanom, orasaka caay kami pihacol mama" han to no wawa, ci mama sato nangra saowal saan: " ano matira aca katayra ho miliyaw a miladom, tingalaw to kiya" han to no mama. Miliyaw heca a patiko koya wawa a tatosa a miladom, tahira han nangra, matiya to a mangota kaiya nanom, micofay heca kiyan a malikakaay,tahira saan i pisakilangan " ira " han ni mama nagra a mitala, " nawi, matiya to mama a mafinor, o cayay kami kapiladom" han to no wawa ko sowal ci mamaan. Ya sato mama ci Topalocong itira to a mayoyang to," ano matira aca a mafinor,o iraay ko mikari'angay i fafa'ed kiya, o hada demaken aca namo a malikaka, kasihawan ato 'idoc a miladom, tahira han namo ano mafinor heca, kamo to i,dipdip han a pasifafaw ma'araw namo koya a mingotaay haw, ano o maan to kira a mari'angay, ano ira a ma'araw namo itira,aka pisamata ka o recafi' namo a mipatay, tangsol han a militangal haw" han to no mama."hayi" sato koya tatosaay a wawa. Patayen koya mingotaay tangsol litangalen han no mama Tatoy sato koya malikakaay to hawan ato 'idoc a lomowad a miladom. So'elinay tahira han to itira i sa'owac, sa matiya to a mangota, dipdip(hokhok) sato koya a malikakaay pasifafaw, so'elinay tangasa i safafaw koya a malikakaay mafinor to ko nanom. Iniaan aca koya mifinoray to nanom a tamdaw,"inian a tamdaw ko mingotaay" sato a mayoyang koya a malikakaay,tangsol han to nangra a micocok ato milofot, maherek sato a militangal koya a malikakaay tiri'en to nangra koya a tangal, " ci mama ita kini " macekok, ono mita a mama a tangal, nengneng han ko pising so'elinay ci mama ita kini sato cangra. Taraana to i pisakilangan sato koya malikakakaay i, so'elinay malaheci away itira ci mama nangra, o ci mama heca nangra kinian a malofotay o tangic to niya malikakaay," patay han nomita ci mama ita" ,sato cangra.hinam han i,ci mama taca nangra ko mingotaay tinian a nanom, sapisafa'naaw ni mama nangra to wawa, nona o mangalayay to aca to sakapatayaw kinian a mama. Tatoy han to noya malikakaay koya tangal a minokay. Tangasa sato i loma', " citafad kami ina" han to noya malikakaay ci ina nangra, " hamay pa'arawi kako" han to no ina, pa'araw sa o paci'eng, "caay, ka o pising ko pa'arawen" han to no ina.Pa'araaraw sa o kakotong no laway, "caay, ka o pising" han to no ina. Pa'araaraw sa o pilofotan, mayoyang to ko ina," ka o pising" ha kiya kiso, so'elinay pa'araw hanto to pising, iyaan sato o ina "ci mama namo kiraan" sato a mayoyang ato mangic a misaheto(tada o tangic to ni ina), " ano matira aca kamo, o pa'acaay ko nika saanan namo ci mamaan namo, ka o nikangayaw" (militnagl to sapatodong to mama) han to no ina a mayoyang, so'elinay o satokol (misaliway to sakakahemaw no tatirengan) to nangra a malikaka masaromi'ami'ad a mafakac(comikay) ato ma'efer. Papilitangalen no ina to sapatodong to mama Ma'edeng to kini sato cangra a malikaka, o lowad to nangra a mi'adop to ngafor, so'elinay midepdep to cangra kiaan ngafor, malepel to nangrankiyaan ngafor, alaen to nangra ko remes ato do'es a paini ci inaan nangra, sowal sato ci ina nangra, "caay hen kini ka o matatodongay kinian a ngafor, tiyola hen a mi'adop" han to ni ina. === Pacefaday tilid ===
S.PHON: == ÉūaÉūÉÅatan no~u pisafao~uÉū == papiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn ni mama ko~u maÉūakakaaj a faĘĄinajan itija Ä§o~u ira ko~u ĘĶÉĘĶaj a mararamo~uÉŽ~ÉŪaj ĘĶa Éūo~una awaw aĘĶi to~upaÉūo~uĘĶo~uÅ Ä§ananaj,misafaÉūo~uĘĶo~uĘĄ to~u sakasaÉūisin no~u nijaro~uĘĄ to~u sapisamiÄ§ÉĘĶaan a Éūisin, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj saĘĶiwawa sato~u ĘĶaÅra a mararamo~uÉŽ~ÉŪ ira ĘĶi majaw kakaÉūawan ko~u kaka, saĘĶisafa saan ĘĶi o~unak kakaÉūawan tato~usa a maÉūikaka, maÄ§atato~usa o~u faĘĄinajan. safaÉūo~uĘĶo~uĘĄ sato~u ko~u mama naÅra a maÉūikaka, "mikiÉūaÅ Ä§o~u kita a maramamama" Ä§an no~u mama so~umo~uwaÉū ko~uja maÉūikakaaj. so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj Éūo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ sato~u a misakiÉūaÅ ĘĶaÅra i Éūo~uto~uk no~u faÉūaawaj. jo~u misakiÉūaÅ ĘĶi mama, papiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn ni mama ĘĶa majaw aĘĶi o~unak a maÉūikaka,jaan sato~u maÉūikakaaj "mafo~ukiÉū kami mama to~u ÉūaÉūan a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" Ä§an no~una wawa, o~u mama sato~u "ano~u matira aĘĶa, to~uÉūikawÉn Ä§o~u ako~u ko~u ÉūaÉūan namo~u" Ä§an to~u no~u mama. o~uja mifariwan no~u mama a ÉūaÉūan .sapikÉpikÉÉŽ~ÉŪ sanaj, tama Ä§an no~u mama ko~u maraĘĄajaj a mipaÉūaÉūan,jo~u taÅasa i piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman a saĘĄo~uwaĘĶ, maÄ§ÉrÉk sato~u itira a mifariw a mipaÉūaÉūan, so~uwaÉū sato~u ĘĶi mama:"o~uriri to~u ÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~umÉn to~u" Ä§an to~u ni mama ko~u wawa nira a tato~usa. "Ä§aji" sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj. taÄ§iraÄ§ira i piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman i, ĘĄaraw Ä§an maÅo~uta ko~uja nano~um, o~uja sato~u a maÉūikakaaj, "imatini sato~u i,maÅo~uta aĘĶa kinian a namo~um, a maamaanÉn no~u mita ko~u nipiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" sato~u. mafijo~ur a maÅo~uta ko~u nano~um o~u ĘĶo~ufaj(patiko~u) to~u naÅra tajra ĘĶi mamaan, "iĘĶo~uwa ko~u nano~um" Ä§an to~u ni mama naÅra, so~uwaÉū sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj, "taÄ§ira Ä§an nijam itira i, mafino~ur ko~uja piÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~uman, maÅo~uta ko~u nano~um, o~urasaka ĘĶaaj kami piÄ§aĘĶo~uÉū mama" Ä§an to~u no~u wawa, ĘĶi mama sato~u naÅra sao~uwaÉū saan: " ano~u matira aĘĶa katajra Ä§o~u miÉūijaw a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, tiÅaÉūaw to~u kija" Ä§an to~u no~u mama. miÉūijaw Ä§ÉĘĶa a patiko~u ko~uja wawa a tato~usa a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, taÄ§ira Ä§an naÅra, matija to~u a maÅo~uta kaija nano~um, miĘĶo~ufaj Ä§ÉĘĶa kijan a maÉūikakaaj,taÄ§ira saan i pisakiÉūaÅan " ira " Ä§an ni mama na*ra a mitaÉūa, " nawi, matija to~u mama a mafino~ur, o~u ĘĶajaj kami kapiÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um" Ä§an to~u no~u wawa ko~u so~uwaÉū ĘĶi mamaan. ja sato~u mama ĘĶi to~upaÉūo~uĘĶo~uÅ itira to~u a majo~ujaÅ to~u," ano~u matira aĘĶa a mafino~ur,o~u iraaj ko~u mikariĘĄaÅaj i fafaĘĄÉÉŽ~ÉŪ kija, o~u Ä§aÉŽ~ÉŪa ÉŽ~ÉŪÉmakÉn aĘĶa namo~u a maÉūikaka, kasiÄ§awan ato~u ĘĄiÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĶ a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um, taÄ§ira Ä§an namo~u ano~u mafino~ur Ä§ÉĘĶa, kamo~u to~u i,ÉŽ~ÉŪipÉŽ~ÉŪip Ä§an a pasifafaw maĘĄaraw namo~u ko~uja a miÅo~utaaj Ä§aw, ano~u o~u maan to~u kira a mariĘĄaÅaj, ano~u ira a maĘĄaraw namo~u itira,aka pisamata ka o~u rÉĘĶafiĘĄ namo~u a mipataj, taÅso~uÉū Ä§an a miÉūitaÅaÉū Ä§aw" Ä§an to~u no~u mama."Ä§aji" sato~u ko~uja tato~usaaj a wawa. patajÉn ko~uja miÅo~utaaj taÅso~uÉū ÉūitaÅaÉūÉn Ä§an no~u mama tato~uj sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakaaj to~u Ä§awan ato~u ĘĄiÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĶ a Éūo~umo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ a miÉūaÉŽ~ÉŪo~um. so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj taÄ§ira Ä§an to~u itira i saĘĄo~uwaĘĶ, sa matija to~u a maÅo~uta, ÉŽ~ÉŪipÉŽ~ÉŪip(Ä§o~ukÄ§o~uk) sato~u ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj pasifafaw, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj taÅasa i safafaw ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj mafino~ur to~u ko~u nano~um. iniaan aĘĶa ko~uja mifino~uraj to~u nano~um a tamÉŽ~ÉŪaw,"inian a tamÉŽ~ÉŪaw ko~u miÅo~utaaj" sato~u a majo~ujaÅ ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj,taÅso~uÉū Ä§an to~u naÅra a miĘĶo~uĘĶo~uk ato~u miÉūo~ufo~ut, maÄ§ÉrÉk sato~u a miÉūitaÅaÉū ko~uja a maÉūikakaaj tiriĘĄÉn to~u naÅra ko~uja a taÅaÉū, " ĘĶi mama ita kini " maĘĶÉko~uk, o~uno~u mita a mama a taÅaÉū, nÉÅnÉÅ Ä§an ko~u pisiÅ so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj ĘĶi mama ita kini sato~u ĘĶaÅra. taraana to~u i pisakiÉūaÅan sato~u ko~uja maÉūikakakaaj i, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj maÉūaÄ§ÉĘĶi awaj itira ĘĶi mama naÅra, o~u ĘĶi mama Ä§ÉĘĶa naÅra kinian a maÉūo~ufo~utaj o~u taÅiĘĶ to~u nija maÉūikakaaj," pataj Ä§an no~umita ĘĶi mama ita" ,sato~u ĘĶaÅra.Ä§inam Ä§an i,ĘĶi mama taĘĶa naÅra ko~u miÅo~utaaj tinian a nano~um, sapisafaĘĄnaaw ni mama naÅra to~u wawa, no~una o~u maÅaÉūajaj to~u aĘĶa to~u sakapatajaw kinian a mama. tato~uj Ä§an to~u no~uja maÉūikakaaj ko~uja taÅaÉū a mino~ukaj. taÅasa sato~u i Éūo~umaĘĄ, " ĘĶitafaÉŽ~ÉŪ kami ina" Ä§an to~u no~uja maÉūikakaaj ĘĶi ina naÅra, " Ä§amaj paĘĄarawi kako~u" Ä§an to~u no~u ina, paĘĄaraw sa o~u paĘĶiĘĄÉÅ, "ĘĶaaj, ka o~u pisiÅ ko~u paĘĄarawÉn" Ä§an to~u no~u ina.paĘĄaraaraw sa o~u kako~uto~uÅ no~u Éūawaj, "ĘĶaaj, ka o~u pisiÅ" Ä§an to~u no~u ina. paĘĄaraaraw sa o~u piÉūo~ufo~utan, majo~ujaÅ to~u ko~u ina," ka o~u pisiÅ" Ä§a kija kiso~u, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj paĘĄaraw Ä§anto~u to~u pisiÅ, ijaan sato~u o~u ina "ĘĶi mama namo~u kiraan" sato~u a majo~ujaÅ ato~u maÅiĘĶ a misaÄ§Éto~u(taÉŽ~ÉŪa o~u taÅiĘĶ to~u ni ina), " ano~u matira aĘĶa kamo~u, o~u paĘĄaĘĶaaj ko~u nika saanan namo~u ĘĶi mamaan namo~u, ka o~u nikaÅajaw" (miÉūitna*Éū to~u sapato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅ to~u mama) Ä§an to~u no~u ina a majo~ujaÅ, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj o~u sato~uko~uÉū (misaÉūiwaj to~u sakakaÄ§Émaw no~u tatirÉÅan) to~u naÅra a maÉūikaka masaro~umiĘĄamiĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪ a mafakaĘĶ(ĘĶo~umikaj) ato~u maĘĄÉfÉr. papiÉūitaÅaÉūÉn no~u ina to~u sapato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅ to~u mama maĘĄÉÉŽ~ÉŪÉÅ to~u kini sato~u ĘĶaÅra a maÉūikaka, o~u Éūo~uwaÉŽ~ÉŪ to~u naÅra a miĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪo~up to~u Åafo~ur, so~uĘĄÉÉūinaj miÉŽ~ÉŪÉpÉŽ~ÉŪÉp to~u ĘĶaÅra kiaan Åafo~ur, maÉūÉpÉÉū to~u naÅrankijaan Åafo~ur, aÉūaÉn to~u naÅra ko~u rÉmÉs ato~u ÉŽ~ÉŪo~uĘĄÉs a paini ĘĶi inaan naÅra, so~uwaÉū sato~u ĘĶi ina naÅra, "ĘĶaaj Ä§Én kini ka o~u matato~uÉŽ~ÉŪo~uÅaj kinian a Åafo~ur, tijo~uÉūa Ä§Én a miĘĄaÉŽ~ÉŪo~up" Ä§an to~u ni ina. === paĘĶÉfaÉŽ~ÉŪaj tiÉūiÉŽ~ÉŪ ===
